title: orchis tridentata subsp. commutata
intro: Orchis tridentata subsp. commutata, also known as the 'dwarf iris', is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Orchis tridentata subsp. commutata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
